# StudyBros

> AI-powered study platform with MCP server. Ingest documents, generate flashcards/quizzes, study with FSRS spaced repetition, track mastery.

## Docs

- [Quick Start](quick-start.md): Get started in 2 minutes
- [Installation](install.md): Full installation guide
- [Tools Reference](tools.md): All 10 MCP tools
- [Resources Reference](resources.md): All 9 MCP resources
- [Prompts Reference](prompts.md): All 8 MCP prompts

## Examples

- [Claude Code Setup](examples/claude-code-setup.md): Use with Claude Code
- [Claude Desktop Setup](examples/claude-desktop-setup.md): Use with Claude Desktop
- [Any MCP Client](examples/generic-mcp-setup.md): Use with any MCP-compatible client
